## [00:00 - 01:41]

Hi, this is Don Crowther. Let's talk about your post close strategy. So you've run through your entire webinar file. Everything's done. Now what do you do? And I have to share something with you. So this is something that just drives me nuts. When someone completes a launch and then does absolutely nothing with the relationships that they've just built. You've just generated a ton of goodwill. You just gave them an amazing webinar. You gave them replays. You gave them a sales page. You sent them emails. You built this relationship, which brings with it. Yes, some people are tired of getting lots of emails from you and that that will happen. But there's also a bunch of goodwill that's come from this. So use it. Give them some free stuff. Then put them into a campaign to sell them something else in a couple of weeks. Now note, this doesn't have to be your product. In fact, most of the time you end up sending out someone else's product for which you can get paid an affiliate commission. But you have a hot list at that moment where people are excited about you. They're not yet tired of you and they're still opening your emails. So let's use it. Please don't drive Don nuts. I'm close enough without your help.
